entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Extrashort duration variety ‘VL Arhar-1’ (ICPL 88039) of Cajanus cajan (L.) Millsp., suitable for grain production and soil conservation.

entities.name: UTTARAKHAND
entities.description: State in India with hilly areas, low soil fertility, and resource poor farmers.

entities.name: HIMALAYAS
entities.description: Mountain range including the hills of Uttarakhand.

entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: Low soil fertility characterizing areas where pigeonpea cultivation is suitable.

entities.name: FARMERS
entities.description: Resource poor small holder farmers in Uttarakhand.

entities.name: GRAIN PRODUCTION
entities.description: Yield of up to 1,800 kg/ha from pigeonpea.

entities.name: NUTRITION
entities.description: Improved nutrition through home-grown high protein food.

relationships.weight: Pigeonpea can be grown successfully in Uttarakhand.
Uttarakhand is located in the Himalayas.
Pigeonpea is suitable for areas with low soil fertility.
Pigeonpea directly benefits the livelihoods of farmers.
Pigeonpea has grain production as a trait.
Pigeonpea has soil conservation as a trait.
VL Arhar-1 is a variety of Pigeonpea.
